S.FORM: Ron Baker hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. kawas tay 1993, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 3, Ron Baker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ron ő≤aker ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēaras~…ē mari Ē tpu ¶~ ®iŇč taj s~…ēuruw. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ron ő≤aker, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
